title: Dartmouth Film Society Spring Screening
location: Loew Auditorium, Black Family Visual Arts Center
description: Spring term kickoff screening featuring short films made by Dartmouth students over winter term. Q&A with filmmakers to follow. Free and open to all.

title: Open Mic Night — Baker Tower Room
description: Monthly open mic night open to all performers — musicians, poets, comedians, spoken word artists. Sign up at the door. 5 minute slots, no experience required.

title: Senior Art Thesis Exhibition Opening
description: Opening reception for the annual senior thesis exhibition featuring work by graduating studio art majors. Meet the artists, see the work, free refreshments.

title: Hop Stop Musical — Workshop Reading
description: Workshop reading of Hop Stop, an original musical set during Dartmouth finals week. Come hear new songs and give feedback that will shape the full production next fall.

title: Design + Tech Meetup
description: Informal meetup for students interested in design, UX, and technology. Lightning talks from 3 students, then open networking. Great for finding collaborators across disciplines.
